scripts.data:zones: mapshaper public/data/shapefiles/DRC_Health_zones.shp -join public/data/health_zone_metadata.28May.csv keys=Pcode_Mins,ref_dhis2 fields=relative_risk -filter-fields Nom,PROVINCE,relative_risk -each "Nom = Nom === 'Mongbalu' ? 'Mongbwalu' : Nom" -simplify 8% keep-shapes -clean -each 'cx = Math.round(this.innerX*1e5)/1e5, cy = Math.round(this.innerY*1e5)/1e5' -o public/data/health-zones.geojson format=geojson precision=0.0001
